title: Depression Type
wikitext:
[]: Depression Type             Quote Post by Thomas68 » Wed Jan 07, 2015 6:12 pm It's been a while since I last posted here... Well, we all know that if Shinji had a chance to visit a psychological health specialist he would be diagnosed with depression. But what specific kind of depression Shinji suffers from? - Major Depression - Dysthymia - Atypical Depression - Psychotic Depression - Bipolar Disorder - Situational Depression - Organic Depression - Nervous Dperession - Manic Depression Which one would Shinji be diagnosed with?

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Wed Jan 07, 2015 6:52 pm My first thought is to wonder whether he is actually depicted sufficiently consistently in any case; that may depend on our diagnosis of course. (And some of your options are the same, BTW)

[]:             Quote Post by TheAdmiral » Wed Jan 07, 2015 7:58 pm Not depression, avoidant personality disorder.

[]:             Quote Post by EvangelionGodMode » Thu Jan 08, 2015 12:55 am Which ever one guilt complex and isolationist would go under. O and kid who pilots giant robot and has asshole dad.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Thu Jan 08, 2015 2:35 am TheAdmiral wrote: Not depression, avoidant personality disorder.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Thu Jan 08, 2015 6:58 am Before arriving to Tokyo-3, I would say he's just gloomy and in need of a hug, then from here I would massive PTSD piled one upon the other until a complete mental breakdown happens in EoE.

[]:             Quote Post by Tumbling Down » Wed Jan 28, 2015 2:35 am pwhodges wrote: My first thought is to wonder whether he is actually depicted sufficiently consistently in any case; that may depend on our diagnosis of course. (And some of your options are the same, BTW)

[]:             Quote Post by Eleven » Wed Jan 28, 2015 1:27 pm Bagheera wrote: Both.

[]:             Quote Post by LukeMM95 » Wed Jan 28, 2015 1:38 pm Tumbling Down wrote: I don't know how much I am like Shinji as a person, Shinji's depression is the closest depiction to mine I have ever seen. There are even aspects I would never have publicly admitted to had I not seen Eva.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Fri Jan 30, 2015 5:51 pm Eleven wrote: I guess that's somewhat right. But personality disorders shouldn't be diagnosed in minors. 14 is way too young to determine that. Any psychiatrist would consider watching you mum vanishing inside some big monster call a trauma. So I'd diagnose him with some trauma related chronic depression or something familiar.

[]:             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Fri Jan 30, 2015 9:45 pm Eleven wrote: I guess that's somewhat right. But personality disorders shouldn't be diagnosed in minors. 14 is way too young to determine that. Any psychiatrist would consider watching you mum vanishing inside some big monster call a trauma. So I'd diagnose him with some trauma related chronic depression or something familiar.

[]:             Quote Post by LukeMM95 » Sat Jan 31, 2015 7:58 am kuribo-04 wrote: But to me the characters never seemed like 14 year old. I think Anno doesn't remember that time too well. They seem a little older.

[]:             Quote Post by Eleven » Tue Feb 03, 2015 5:29 am Bagheera wrote: I know psychiatrists who feel they shouldn't be diagnosed, period. But I responded to the question asked, so.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Tue Feb 03, 2015 5:38 am Eleven wrote: Yeah, I know. I meant that very general, although I quoted you. Sorry for that.

But what specific kind of depression Shinji suffers from? - Major Depression - Dysthymia - Atypical Depression - Psychotic Depression - Bipolar Disorder - Situational Depression - Orga
